summary: Eval cases controller: CRUD for test cases, A/B run execution via agent-tool-bridge, session replay, tool call metrics
Agent eval report: per-agent tool chat rate, send-public/private confusion matrix, tool success rate and latency percentiles
Skill registry: CRUD for skills (SKILL.md + openai.yaml), listSkills/resolveSkills/getSkill, external skill dirs
Agent prompt builder: skill injection (formatSkillDescriptors/formatSkillDocuments), expectations tagging, tool bridge env injection
Agent tool bridge: invocation context, dryRun mode, tool call event recording, public/private post interception
Agent eval metrics doc: expectations policy, tool call events, confusion matrix, eval report script usage

Phase 1 backend/controller/test chain landed: generate now auto smoke-validates, validity_status unified to pending/validated/invalid, run-all reruns validated+invalid, and minimal E2E covers generate→auto-validate via injected startRun/evaluateRun.

Skill Tests UX polish landed in eval-cases: selected-skill overview, friendlier Chinese labels, search/status filters, clearer empty/detail states, persisted skill selection, configurable generate/manual create options, and summary refresh after create/run/delete/generate actions.

Phase 2 regression slice landed: skill-test runs now persist promptVersion on eval_case_runs, case/skill regression summary endpoints group by provider:model:promptVersion, and Skill Tests detail UI renders per-case regression comparison plus prompt-version run controls.

Phase 2 L3 sequence validation landed: structured expectedTools now accept order/sequence metadata, execution evaluation emits sequenceCheck and gates executionPassed on ordered matches, the Skill Tests UI surfaces ordered-tool diagnostics, and E2E covers both ordered pass/fail cases.

Phase 2 full-mode AI judge landed: full-mode trigger evaluation now records behavior-signal matches plus AI judge verdict/confidence/reason, executeRun awaits async evaluation, Skill Tests detail UI surfaces trigger judge diagnostics, and E2E covers the fallback path where only AI judge can pass trigger.

Phase 2 generator extraction landed: skill-test generator now derives structured expectedTools from fenced snippets, inline commands, and plain-text workflow lines, normalizes placeholder-heavy paths into <contains:...> checks, and regression coverage now includes generator extraction plus contains-based execution matching.

Planning update: Phase 3 PRD now pivots Full-mode evaluation from expectedTools/keyword hard-match to expectedSteps behavior-driven scoring, step-level judge outputs with evidenceIds, code-computed sequence from evidence order, and legacy expectedTools compatibility.

PRD wording cleanup: unified Full-mode language around expectedSteps primary judgment, requiredStepCompletionRate as the core outcome dimension, code-computed sequence via evidenceIds, and tool metrics as supporting signals unless the rubric marks them critical.

PRD ambiguity cleanup: Full-mode generation now names the case input as userPrompt (legacy triggerPrompt alias), AI fail suggestions only escalate to fail when tied to verifiable hard conditions, and supporting tool metrics are explicitly excluded from fail unless the rubric marks them critical.

PRD deepening: added normalized expectedSteps/evaluationRubric contracts, deterministic Full verdict aggregation pseudocode, and explicit legacy expectedTools/expectedBehavior/expectedSequence -> expectedSteps mapping rules to reduce implementation ambiguity.

PRD contract cleanup: fixed userPrompt/triggerPrompt canonical semantics, added stable strongSignal ids plus stepId+signalId overrides, defined timeline evidenceId namespaces/validation, and changed primary-below-pass handling to borderline instead of fail.

PRD logic clarification: added criticalDimensions/constraintChecks contracts, switched judge matched signals to stable signal ids, defined borderline helper thresholds, and declared evaluation_json as the canonical Full-run truth with mirrored scalar columns.

PRD validator/spec refinement: added a save-vs-warning-vs-needs-review validator checklist, detailed judge-output validation and preflight rules, expanded implementation workstreams, and mirrored required step completion metrics into skill_test_runs for filtering/reporting.

PRD Workstream-A deepening: froze the validator issue-envelope shape, added a concrete implementation checklist for save/preflight/judge validation, defined a rule matrix with stable issue codes and per-stage behaviors, and split Workstream A into case-vs-run subtracks with explicit completion gates.

PRD/UI contract cleanup: made issues[] the only canonical validation envelope, clarified aiJudge.status vs needs-review semantics, defined strongSignals state/tool/text minimum shapes plus unique step.order expectations, and aligned the Skill Tests UI to send userPrompt alongside triggerPrompt while relaxing the detail-header sticky breakpoint for zoomed desktop layouts.

Workstream A start: skill-test create/update now accept canonical userPrompt alongside triggerPrompt, mirror userPrompt in case reads, emit issues[] on successful writes, reject prompt-alias conflicts plus invalid expectedSequence/evaluationRubric shapes with structured issue codes, and HTTP error responses preserve extra HttpError details such as issues[] for frontend follow-up.

Workstream A follow-up: case list/get now expose persistent validation metadata (validation.issues + caseSchemaStatus), mark-ready blocks invalid stored schemas with structured case_schema_invalid details, and the Skill Tests UI surfaces case-level schema warnings/errors in cards, detail view, and ready-gate failure toasts.

Skill Tests UI polish: run-response issues[] now remain visible after list/summary refresh, issue toasts/panels map core validation codes to clearer Chinese copy, and detail-header sticky breakpoint is aligned to 760px for zoomed 1366-width scenarios.

Skill Tests validation UX polish: issue panels now sort by severity, split error/warning/needs-review with distinct visual tones and count chips, and inline run-detail validation cards reuse the same severity styling for faster diagnosis.

Workstream A schema/prefight/judge pass: added expected_steps_json persistence, normalized expectedSteps + rubric contracts in skill-test-controller, enabled legacy full-case expectedSteps derivation during run preflight, validated judge step/constraint outputs with placeholder backfill and structured issues[], and threaded those validation results into run evaluation payloads without breaking existing legacy full-mode flows.

Workstream A status cleanup: migration/controller/summary/run-all now treat case_status as the only readiness source instead of backfilling from legacy validity_status, and regression coverage now asserts old DB rows remain draft unless explicitly marked ready.

Workstream A generate-path hardening: generate->create now avoids sending explicit empty expectedSteps in dynamic mode, full-mode draft create maps legacy expectedSequence tool-name entries onto expectedSteps ids via strongSignals when possible, and skill-test e2e/generator/schema regressions all pass after the fix.

Workstream A canonical full-save tightening: validateAndNormalizeCaseInput now emits expected_goal_required for full-mode create/update when expectedGoal is missing (while run preflight keeps explicit fallback mode), and test coverage now includes schema-level rejection plus e2e create-path rejection with updated full-mode fixtures.

Workstream A sequence-evidence guardrail: full-mode sequence expectations now resolve step-id expectedSequence entries to concrete tool names via expectedSteps strongSignals/order hints, run preflight and execution validation emit critical_sequence_evidence_unavailable (needs-review) when critical sequence constraints cannot be verifiably constructed, and verdict aggregation caps those runs to borderline with dedicated schema/e2e regression coverage.

Workstream A persistence closure: normalizeTestRunRow now treats evaluation_json as canonical projection source for full-run mirror metrics, emits evaluation_projection_mismatch when scalar columns diverge from evaluation_json, emits evaluation_projection_failed when dimensions cannot be projected, and appends these warnings into run.validationIssues plus evaluation.validation.issues with end-to-end regression coverage.

Workstream C alignment update: removed full-run preflight legacy step derivation (no automatic expectedTools/expectedBehavior -> expectedSteps fallback), kept legacy full fields as-is for read-only continuity, and updated schema/e2e regressions to assert verdict/persistence behavior under the no-legacy-fallback path.

Workstream B landed: generator full-mode contract now canonicalizes userPrompt with stable expectedSteps/strongSignal ids, judge full-mode emits fixed structured dimensions with evidenceIds and signal-id validation plus parse_failed fallback, and generation metadata (provider/model/createdAt) is persisted and exposed in case responses.

Workstream D closure landed in Skill Tests UI: full-run diagnostics panels (steps/constraints/aggregation/ai judge), local JSON and form validation folded into unified issues panels, success-aware issues clear/retain policy finalized, and manual create now auto-focuses the new case detail to streamline create/edit/run troubleshooting.

Workstream E landing: expanded skill-test schema contract matrix coverage (prompt length bounds, step/signal/rubric validation, sequence conflict + unsupported matcher warnings, and judge runtime_failed/verdict-invalid/unknown-id backfill paths), and added rollout-checklist.md with automated regression gates plus manual UI/API verification steps.

Final closure polish: Skill Tests detail header no longer stays sticky above the page, draft-generation null guards now keep typecheck/build green, and rollout closure updates the checklist plus completion metadata for the Phase 3 handoff.
